bullet_changes.original_text: Built a gradient boosting model (XGBoost) to predict 30-day hospital readmission risk, achieving AUC of 0.81 on held-out test set
bullet_changes.revised_text: Built a gradient boosting model using XGBoost, Python, SQL, pandas, NumPy, and scikit-learn to predict 30-day hospital readmission risk, applying biostatistics, epidemiology, health economics, and causal inference principles, achieving AUC of 0.81 on held-out test set

bullet_changes.original_text: Cleaned and joined claims data across 4 disparate sources (1.2M patient records) using pandas and SQL
bullet_changes.revised_text: Cleaned and joined claims data across 4 disparate sources, totaling 1.2M patient records, utilizing pandas and SQL

bullet_changes.original_text: Automated weekly reporting pipeline in Python, saving 6 hours of analyst time per week
bullet_changes.revised_text: Automated a weekly reporting pipeline in Python, saving 6 hours of analyst time per week

bullet_changes.original_text: Applied propensity score matching to control for selection bias in treatment group comparisons
bullet_changes.revised_text: Applied propensity score matching to control for selection bias in treatment group comparisons

bullet_changes.original_text: Analyzed longitudinal survey data using R (lme4, survey) for a federally funded study on household food insecurity
bullet_changes.revised_text: Analyzed longitudinal survey data for an observational study using R, specifically lme4 and survey packages, in a federally funded research project on household food insecurity

bullet_changes.original_text: Co-authored a working paper submitted to the Journal of Public Health Economics
bullet_changes.revised_text: Co-authored a working paper submitted to the Journal of Public Health Economics

bullet_changes.original_text: Trained logistic regression and random forest models on 500K telecom customer records to predict churn within 90 days
bullet_changes.revised_text: Trained and evaluated logistic regression and random forest models on 500K telecom customer records to predict churn within 90 days, leveraging predictive modeling and machine learning techniques.

bullet_changes.original_text: Used SHAP values to generate feature importance explanations for business stakeholders
bullet_changes.revised_text: Utilized SHAP values to generate actionable feature importance explanations for business stakeholders, facilitating data-driven decision making.

bullet_changes.original_text: Reduced feature set from 140 to 28 features via recursive feature elimination without loss in AUC
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed and implemented recursive feature elimination to reduce the feature set from 140 to 28 features without compromising AUC, ensuring model efficiency and effectiveness.

bullet_changes.original_text: Forecasted hourly taxi demand by zone using Meta's Prophet with US holiday regressors
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed and deployed a zone-based taxi demand forecasting system using Meta's Prophet with US holiday regressors to accurately predict hourly demand.

bullet_changes.original_text: Pulled and aggregated 3 years of TLC trip record data from BigQuery (120M rows)
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed and implemented a data pipeline to pull and aggregate 3 years of TLC trip record data from BigQuery (120M rows), enabling data-driven insights.

bullet_changes.original_text: Achieved 11% lower MAPE than baseline moving-average forecast
bullet_changes.revised_text: Evaluated and optimized the forecasting model, achieving an 11% lower Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) than the baseline moving-average forecast.
